_comment: Contoh config PRODUCTION: hostname resmi PLN + TLS. Perpindahan dari staging hanya mengubah 'host' (dan sertifikat + deployment di sisi server). Tidak ada perubahan kode aplikasi.

transcription.initial_prompt: Indonesian meeting transcript. Transcribe the audio in Indonesian; do not translate to English. Preserve technical terms, abbreviations, system names, and common loanwords as spoken.
